The '''''Hinthra''''' was [[Elis Helrot/Legends|Elis Helrot's]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of choice. It was a highly modified freighter. He usually smuggled [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] or [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to and from [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]]. It was armed with a pair of double [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]]. The crew consisted of two other [[Givin/Legends|Givins]] and a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]].

It is unknown what type of starship it was, very few had ever seen it.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Running the Sisar|book=Secrets of the Sisar Run}} {{1st}}
